# tplinkeasysmart_port_setting (Resource)

Manage one switch port's configurable status, speed, and flow control values.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_setting" "port2" {
  port_id             = 2
  enabled             = true
  speed_config        = 4
  flow_control_config = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Administrative enable state for the port.
- `flow_control_config` (Number) Configured flow-control enum from the device page model. Valid values are 0 or 1.
- `port_id` (Number) Physical switch port number.
- `speed_config` (Number) Configured speed and duplex enum from the device page model. Valid observed values are 1 through 6.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier derived from port_id.
